title: Break new and cached usage down by model
action: Render billed cost, new tokens, and cached tokens for each model, followed by total billed cost when multiple models are present.

truths: Every model reports its own billed cost, new tokens, and cached tokens
Multiple models end with total billed cost
prohibitions: Do not recombine model usage into session-only token totals

trace.outcome: Each model now reports billed cost, new tokens, and cached tokens, followed by total billed cost.
trace.verify_output: fable-5 $20 · 549k new · 7.8M cached + sonnet-5 $4.22 · 600k new · 10.7M cached + opus-4-8 $2.46 · 196k new · 1.1M cached = $27 billed; structural assertion PASS; cache replay PASS
